meta.title: Livestream - Transformers from scratch
meta.description:
Part 1: Building a weather prediction model using a transformer architecture.
Part 2 next week here: https://youtube.com/live/O9f8GWnHl7w?feature=share
Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1EpHL-VgZu5AWAu00DN6eplRmD12DD2QE?usp=sharing

Trelis Resources: Trelis.com/About
